chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – The woman performs Hajj on behalf of the man

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/216)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/216)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الرَّجُلُ يَحُجُّ عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ وَ الْمَرْأَةُ تَحُجُّ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The man performs Hajj on behalf of the woman, and the woman performs Hajj on behalf of the man’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if women can perform al-Hajj on behalf of men and men can perform al-Hajj on behalf of women. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not harmful.’”
